code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Group triples by subject to allow multiple entities
    from collections import defaultdict
    subject_map = defaultdict(list)
    for t in triples:
        subject_map[t.subject].append(t)

    # Simple predicate → phrase templates
    templates = {
        # Airport‑specific predicates
        "cityServed": "serves {obj}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "is {obj} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "is {obj} feet above sea level",
        # more natural phrasing without redundant unit words
        "runwayLength": "has a runway length of {obj}",
        "runwayName": "runway name is {obj}",
        "location": "is located in {obj}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "is operated by {obj}",
        "country": "is in {obj}",
        "isPartOf": "is part of {obj}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "ICAO code is {obj}",
        "locationIdentifier": "location identifier is {obj}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "IATA code is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "has a first runway length of {obj} feet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "has a first runway length of {obj} metres",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "first runway surface is {obj}",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "first runway number is {obj}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "runway surface is {obj}",
        # Generic entity predicates
        "leader": "leader is {obj}",
        "capital": "capital is {obj}",
        "language": "language is {obj}",
        "officialLanguage": "official language is {obj}",
        "currency": "currency is {obj}",
        "owner": "owner is {obj}",
        "foundingYear": "was founded in {obj}",
        "founder": "was founded by {obj}",
        "postalCode": "postal code is {obj}",
        "areaCode": "area code is {obj}",
        "largestCity": "largest city is {obj}",
        "countySeat": "county seat is {obj}",
        "mayor": "mayor is {obj}",
        "leaderParty": "leader party is {obj}",
        "leaderTitle": "leader title is {obj}",
        "chief": "chief is {obj}",
        "hubAirport": "hub airport is {obj}",
        "regionServed": "serves region {obj}",
        "nativeName": "native name is {obj}",
        "jurisdiction": "has jurisdiction in {obj}",
        # Biological classification predicates
        "class": "class is {obj}",
        "division": "division is {obj}",
        "order": "order is {obj}",
        "species": "species is {obj}",
        "demonym": "demonym is {obj}",
    }

    # Helper to format numbers nicely (remove trailing .0 and add commas)
    def _fmt_number(val: str) -> str:
        try:
            num = float(val.replace(",", ""))
            if num.is_integer():
                num = int(num)
            return f"{num:,}"
        except Exception:
            return val

    # Mapping predicates to a more natural descriptive phrase (used when multiple facts are combined)
    descriptor_map = {
        "cityServed": "city served",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "elevation above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "elevation above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "elevation above sea level",
        "runwayLength": "runway length",
        "runwayName": "runway name",
        "location": "location",
        "operatingOrganisation": "operating organisation",
        "country": "country",
        "isPartOf": "part of",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "ICAO Location Identifier",
        "locationIdentifier": "location identifier",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "IATA location identifier",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "first runway length",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "first runway length",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "first runway surface",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "first runway number",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "runway surface",
        "leader": "leader",
        "capital": "capital",
        "language": "language",
        "officialLanguage": "official language",
        "currency": "currency",
        "owner": "owner",
        "foundingYear": "founding year",
        "founder": "founder",
        "postalCode": "postal code",
        "areaCode": "area code",
        "largestCity": "largest city",
        "countySeat": "county seat",
        "mayor": "mayor",
        "leaderParty": "leader party",
        "leaderTitle": "leader title",
        "chief": "chief",
        "hubAirport": "hub airport",
        "regionServed": "region served",
        "nativeName": "native name",
        "jurisdiction": "jurisdiction",
        "class": "class",
        "division": "division",
        "order": "order",
        "species": "species",
        "demonym": "demonym",
    }

    sentences = []
    for subject, tlist in subject_map.items():
        clauses = []
        for t in tlist:
            obj = t.object.strip('"')
            pred = t.predicate

            # Special handling for biological order to match example phrasing
            if pred == "order":
                clause = f"{subject} is of the {obj} order"
                clauses.append(clause)
                continue

            # Use descriptor map when we have a natural description
            if pred in descriptor_map:
                descriptor = descriptor_map[pred]
                # For elevation predicates, add units if they are numeric
                if pred in {"elevationAboveTheSeaLevel", "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres"}:
                    obj_fmt = _fmt_number(obj) + " metres"
                    clause = f"The {descriptor} of {subject} is {obj_fmt}"
                elif pred == "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet":
                    obj_fmt = _fmt_number(obj) + " feet"
                    clause = f"The {descriptor} of {subject} is {obj_fmt}"
                elif pred in {"runwayLength", "1stRunwayLengthFeet", "1stRunwayLengthMetre"}:
                    # add appropriate unit
                    unit = "metres" if "Metre" in pred else ("feet" if "Feet" in pred else "metres")
                    obj_fmt = _fmt_number(obj) + f" {unit}"
                    clause = f"The {descriptor} of {subject} is {obj_fmt}"
                else:
                    clause = f"The {descriptor} of {subject} is {obj}"
                clauses.append(clause)
            else:
                # Fallback to a generic phrase
                generic = pred.replace('_', ' ')
                clause = f"{subject} {generic} {obj}"
                clauses.append(clause)

        # Combine clauses into a single fluent sentence
        if not clauses:
            continue
        if len(clauses) == 1:
            sentence = clauses[0] + "."
        else:
            # Join with commas and an 'and' before the last clause
            sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + " and " + clauses[-1] + "."
        sentences.append(sentence)

    return " ".join(sentences)

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
